title: SQL RBT (Role-Based Access) Feature Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of creating and assigning roles, granting permissions, and managing user access within a Database Management System.
relationships: DBA executes CREATE ROLE to define a new Role
DBA uses GRANT to assign Privileges to a Role
DBA uses GRANT to assign a Role to a User/Other Role
User inherits Privileges through their assigned Roles
